style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial illustration, navy-blue accented, of an architect inside a building assembling scattered findings into one clear defensive map and a bound report, with a shield rising over the structure. A sense of evidence being turned into a calm, authoritative verdict. Muted Alberta cream base with a clear navy-blue accent, archival print quality, no text.
composed_prompt:
Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.

Subject: An editorial illustration, navy-blue accented, of an architect inside a building assembling scattered findings into one clear defensive map and a bound report, with a shield rising over the structure. A sense of evidence being turned into a calm, authoritative verdict. Muted Alberta cream base with a clear navy-blue accent, archival print quality, no text.

The diagram must clearly communicate the structure described. Use crisp legible labels. No watermarks. No photo realism. Architectural diagram aesthetic.
